name: Build a Personal Website
description: A modern personal portfolio, blog, or landing page

mcpConfigs.name: chrome-devtools
mcpConfigs.userNotice: You'll see a Chrome DevTools window open in the background while the frontend engineer works. No action needed from you.

postScaffold: Set up basic layout shell in src/app/layout.tsx

initialContext: The user wants to build a personal website. Ask what kind (portfolio, blog, landing page), what content they have ready (bio, projects, headshot, resume), and any visual preferences (dark/light, minimal/bold, specific sites they like). Then hand off to the architect for tech decisions, designer for visual direction, and frontend engineer for implementation.

ticketTemplate.title: Preview and final QA
ticketTemplate.note: Run dev server silently, PM shows 'Preview' button. Deployment is an optional follow-up, not a default ticket.
